# VS Code Shortcuts Cheat Sheet 🚀

A collection of the most useful, productive, and frequently used Visual Studio Code shortcuts.

---

# 🔍 Navigation

| Shortcut           | Action                      |
| ------------------ | --------------------------- |
| `Ctrl + P`         | Quick file search           |
| `Ctrl + Shift + P` | Command Palette             |
| `Ctrl + Tab`       | Switch between open tabs    |
| `Ctrl + G`         | Go to line number           |
| `F12`              | Go to Definition            |
| `Alt + ←`          | Go Back                     |
| `Alt + →`          | Go Forward                  |
| `Ctrl + Shift + O` | Go to Symbol in File        |
| `Ctrl + T`         | Search Symbols in Workspace |
| `Ctrl + ↑`         | Scroll without mouse        |

---

# ✏️ Editing

| Shortcut               | Action                 |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------- |
| `Ctrl + /`             | Toggle comment         |
| `Shift + Alt + A`      | Toggle block comment   |
| `Alt + ↑ / ↓`          | Move line up/down      |
| `Shift + Alt + ↑ / ↓`  | Duplicate line         |
| `Ctrl + Shift + K`     | Delete line            |
| `Ctrl + Enter`         | Insert line below      |
| `Ctrl + Shift + Enter` | Insert line above      |
| `Alt + Click`          | Multi-cursor           |
| `Ctrl + Alt + ↑ / ↓`   | Add cursor above/below |
| `Ctrl + D`             | Select next occurrence |
| `Ctrl + Shift + L`     | Select all occurrences |
| `Ctrl + Space`         | Trigger suggestions    |

---

# 🔎 Find & Replace

| Shortcut           | Action               |
| ------------------ | -------------------- |
| `Ctrl + F`         | Find                 |
| `Ctrl + H`         | Replace              |
| `F3`               | Next match           |
| `Shift + F3`       | Previous match       |
| `Ctrl + Shift + F` | Search in workspace  |
| `Ctrl + Shift + H` | Replace in workspace |

---

# 📂 File Management

| Shortcut           | Action            |
| ------------------ | ----------------- |
| `Ctrl + N`         | New file          |
| `Ctrl + O`         | Open file         |
| `Ctrl + S`         | Save              |
| `Ctrl + Shift + S` | Save As           |
| `Ctrl + W`         | Close tab         |
| `Ctrl + K W`       | Close all tabs    |
| `Ctrl + Shift + T` | Reopen closed tab |

---

# 🖥️ Terminal

| Shortcut                 | Action               |
| ------------------------ | -------------------- |
| `` Ctrl + ` ``           | Toggle terminal      |
| `Ctrl + Shift + ``       | New terminal         |
| `Ctrl + Shift + 5`       | Split terminal       |
| `Ctrl + PageUp/PageDown` | Switch terminals     |
| `Ctrl + C`               | Stop running process |

---

# 📑 Panels & Layout

| Shortcut           | Action              |
| ------------------ | ------------------- |
| `Ctrl + B`         | Toggle Sidebar      |
| `Ctrl + J`         | Toggle Bottom Panel |
| `Ctrl + Shift + E` | Explorer            |
| `Ctrl + Shift + G` | Source Control      |
| `Ctrl + Shift + X` | Extensions          |
| `Ctrl + Shift + D` | Run & Debug         |
| `Ctrl + Shift + U` | Output Panel        |

---

# ⚡ Refactoring

| Shortcut            | Action           |
| ------------------- | ---------------- |
| `F2`                | Rename Symbol    |
| `Ctrl + .`          | Quick Fix        |
| `Shift + F12`       | Find References  |
| `Alt + Shift + F`   | Format Document  |
| `Ctrl + K Ctrl + F` | Format Selection |
| `Ctrl + Shift + M`  | Problems Panel   |

---

# 💻 Coding (Most Useful)

| Shortcut               | Action             |
| ---------------------- | ------------------ |
| `Tab`                  | Accept suggestion  |
| `Ctrl + Space`         | IntelliSense       |
| `Ctrl + Shift + Space` | Parameter hints    |
| `F8`                   | Next error         |
| `Shift + F8`           | Previous error     |
| `Ctrl + Click`         | Jump to definition |
| `Peek Definition`      | `Alt + F12`        |

---

# 🐞 Debugging

| Shortcut      | Action                |
| ------------- | --------------------- |
| `F5`          | Start Debugging       |
| `Ctrl + F5`   | Run Without Debugging |
| `F9`          | Toggle Breakpoint     |
| `F10`         | Step Over             |
| `F11`         | Step Into             |
| `Shift + F11` | Step Out              |
| `Shift + F5`  | Stop Debugging        |

---

# 🌟 Power User Shortcuts

| Shortcut            | Action                       |
| ------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| `Ctrl + P >`        | Run commands directly        |
| `Ctrl + Shift + P`  | Access every VS Code feature |
| `Ctrl + K Z`        | Zen Mode                     |
| `Ctrl + K V`        | Markdown Preview             |
| `Ctrl + Shift + V`  | Open Markdown Preview        |
| `Ctrl + K S`        | Keyboard Shortcuts           |
| `Ctrl + K Ctrl + T` | Change Theme                 |
| `Ctrl + K Ctrl + 0` | Fold All                     |
| `Ctrl + K Ctrl + J` | Unfold All                   |

---

# 🚀 Daily Driver Shortcuts

If you memorize only 10 shortcuts, learn these first:

1. `Ctrl + Shift + P` → Command Palette
2. `Ctrl + P` → File Search
3. `Ctrl + /` → Comment
4. `Ctrl + D` → Multi-select
5. `F2` → Rename Variable
6. `Ctrl + .` → Quick Fix
7. `Alt + Shift + F` → Format Code
8. `` Ctrl + ` `` → Terminal
9. `F12` → Go to Definition
10. `Ctrl + Shift + F` → Search Entire Project

These alone can easily save hours every week.
